description: Following Giyera’s successful takeover of Zephyr One, Hive, now in control of key S.H.I.E.L.D. prisoners, assures his followers of their victory and that sacrifices have balanced the scales. Hive declares to Malick that he has nothing to fear, echoing the brotherhood motto 'together to the end.'

transcript.line: Good news. Giyera's captured a S.H.I.E.L.D. airship with several prisoners. We should be on our way. Sacrifice is never easy, but we have balanced the scales today. You have nothing else to fear. Together to the end.
